latestIgtvVideos.caption:
Issa light flex 💅🏽@kennzooo (she/her) snatches a smooth, instantly blurred complexion using our #EAZEDROP Blurring Skin Tint in shade 10 and finishes off the subtle beat with 
#CHEEKSOUT CREAM BLUSH in Fuego Flush
and #MATCHSTIX in Purrrl. ✨

Why rock one #GLOSSBOMB when you can wear all em! 😏 Our bestie, @vanzg3 (she/her) put her collection to the test and bihhh it's a SLAY! 😍

Sooo who else down to try this!? 🙋🏽‍♀️

Cop a FREE Mini Gloss Bomb in ‘Dragonfly’ and keychain when you spend $60+ on fentybeauty.com now thru 7/27! No code needed! 👄

Name ONE product that can correct, contour and highlight? 🤔 #MATCHSTIX can do ALL three 💯 AND you can easily touch up on the go with this long-wearing, weightless, cream-to-powder formula! ✨

Cop em all including our 10 NEW shades on Friday, July 22 at fentybeauty.com. 🖤

Summa is here and @tatlafata (she/her) snatched up her #POUTSICLE 🍦in shade #MAITYPE! Get into that hydrating, juicy and vibrant payoff then watch as this lip stain does its thang. 💋

Run, don't walk!! We still have shades available now at Sephora at @kohls boo! #sephoraxkohls 💦

Strutin thru #ParisFashionWeek like 🤩 We pulled up to @casablancabrand's SS23 debut and served nothin but #FENTYFACE! 👏🏾👏🏾👏🏾

🎥🎨: @naimabremer

"This is for Singapore as well, not just for me,” -@kanelk_k on being the first Asian #FENTYFACEPARTNER for @fentybeauty and @fentyskin ❤️ We loved celebratin’ this moment with our #FENTYFAM & @sephorasg squad! ✨

Listennn, #FENTYICON is a lifestyle and @maggie_stadelmann is applying pressure with just one luscious swipe of #GRILLMASTR. 😍

This REFILLABLE bullet lipstick provides a semi-matte, lightweight and lasting finish! 🙌🏾

Cop your fave #MADETOBESEEN shade at fentybeauty.com, @harveynichols, @bootsuk, @ultabeauty, @sephora, @sephoracanada, #sephoraxkohls and @kohls. 💋

UK Fam 🇬🇧celebrate the Jubilee weekend in style with our newest Fenty Member, #POUTSICLE Hydrating Lip Stain, the only lip tint you need for all day juicy hydration. 💄💦

Grab your pop of #POUTSICLE in your nearest @bootsuk or @harveynichols store 🇬🇧

It's another #TutorialTuesday with @alexandraafrench 😍🔥 Tap in and learn how to create a fun & flirty graphic eyeliner shape that’s great for all occasions! ✍🏾 Using our new #WISHYOUWOOD Eyeliner in the shade #INBIGTRUFFLE for the eyeliner & #CUZIMBLACK in the water line ✨

We LIVED for all the #ICONENERGY our #FENTYAFRICA fam was givin in Nigeria 🇳🇬, South Africa 🇿🇦 and Kenya!!! 🇰🇪We can’t wait to see all the flawless #FENTYFACE that is bout to be served 🆙🔥 

Run to ya local retailers NOW👇🏾: 

🇧🇼Botswana : Edgars 
🇰🇪Kenya : @lintonsbeautyworld
🇬🇭Ghana: @essenza_gh

#FENTYAFRICA FAM! 🗣🌍 We pulled up to the Nelson Mandela Square for an ICONIC takeover! 👏🏾

Come thru TODAY to see the hype for ya self and celebrate our official touchdown until 11am PST! 

📍 5th St, Sandown, Sandton, 2031, South Africa 🇿🇦

latestPosts.caption:
Chat, we gonna be OUTSIDE this summer! 🤩✨

The icon, the legend, & everyone’s favorite dewy baddie is BACK ➡️ Body Lava Body Luminizer is available NOW exclusively on TikTok Shop! 🌟 Get that post-vacay glow – whether you booked the trip yet or not – with this dewy, high shine body luminizer! 🙂‍↔️

✨ 4 universal shades
✨ Non-sticky, gel-based formula
✨ Light-diffusing micro-pearls blended with a sheer tint of color
✨ Dewy high-shine finish

Shop early access on TikTok Shop NOW, launching globally on 6/13!

ATTN: Body Lava is back & she’s ONLY on TikTok Shop! 🚨

Glow season is *officially* here & you can shop summer essentials for the whole body on TikTok for up to 25% off from 6/3 - 6/12 💖

✨ Exclusive early access to Body Lava Body Luminizer on 6/3 (launching globally on 6/13)
✨ Special pricing on Fenty bundles
✨ FREE 2-piece gift on $75+ orders: Fenty Beauty makeup bag + Butta Drop packette

Can I get you guys anything? Some snacks? A Gloss Bomb? 💋

🍭 Gloss Bomb in 'Fu$$y'
🍒 Gloss Bomb Heat in 'Hot Cherry'
🍫 Gloss Bomb in 'Hot Chocolit'

latestPosts.caption:
Se brilho é o que você quer… a Fenty entrega! 💋 O Gloss Bomb Oil Point da @fentybeauty é uma experiência Icônica & Imersiva: trazendo brilho, sofisticação e aquele toque especial da Riri.
 
De 31 de Maio a 14 de Junho, no Shopping Eldorado, em São Paulo: 
✨ Brindes exclusivos
✨ Personalização de produtos
✨ Jogos e atividades interativas
✨ Beauty Station para experimentar TODOS os produtos para Lábios de Fenty

If shine is what you want… Fenty Beauty delivers! 💋 The @fentybeauty Gloss Bomb Oil Point is an immersive & iconic experience: bringing shine, sophistication and that iconic Riri touch. 
 
From May 31st to June 14th on Eldorado Shopping, in São Paulo: 
✨ Exclusive giftings & freebies 
✨ Personalize your Gloss Bomb purchase
✨ Interactive games & activities
✨ Beauty station to try-on and test ALL Fenty lip products

Who's ready for a glow up?! 🌟 We partnered with our girls @glowjobpodcast to give back to the Asian American community at Alhambra High School & spotlight the importance of personal and self care 💖 

Subscribe + tune into their episode with Fenty's Director of Global Artistry, Crista Chan at the link in our bio 🎙️

The Gloss Bomb you know & love… but a few degrees hotter ❤️‍🔥

Aspen and Bree wear Gloss Bomb Heat in 'Hot Cherry' 🍒 This lip luminizer and plumper hybrid delivers a hint of tint and fuller looking lips 👄 The Plump Job Complex features a blend Ginger Root Oil + Capsicum Fruit Extract designed to deliver an undeniably plump pout while rich Shea Butter conditions lips for an insanely shiny, hydrated & juicy look 💦

Cop this heat at @sephora, @sephoracanada, @kohls #sephoraxkohls and @ultabeauty! 💋

Gloss Bomb on-the-go 🍒🤎🌸✨

Sundays call for an Ulta Beauty at Target run to stock up on your fave Fenty Snackz to satisfy ALL your cutesy Fenty Beauty cravings 💅🏽💅🏿💅🏻

Shop these mini Gloss Bomb goodies exclusively at @ultabeauty at @target today! 🛒

latestPosts.caption:
Double the baddie, double the Hot Chocolit ❤️‍🔥🍫
​
Nicole & Anai wear Gloss Bomb Stix in 'Hot Chocolit' for rich brown luscious shine with medium pigment that's loaded with Vitamin E, Shea Butter & Squalane to lock in moisture for up to 8 hours 👉🏿👉🏻 then top it off with Gloss Bomb OG in 'Hot Chocolit' for that shimmering rich brown final touch makin' lips look insanely juicy & instantly fuller 🤎​ 

Shop these hotties at @sephora, @sephoracanada, #sephoraxkohls at @kohls, @ultabeauty & fentybeauty.com 💄​

Easy Hot Chocolit... wouldn't want you to melt 🍫

🤎 Gloss Bomb in 'Hot Chocolit' is a shimmering rich brown ultimate gotta-have-it lip gloss with explosive shine that feels as good as it looks​

💄 Gloss Bomb Stix in 'Hot Chocolit' is a rich brown non-sticky, irresistible high shine gloss in a solid stick format that leaves lips feeling instantly nourished & conditioned ​
​
✨ Gloss Bomb Shimmer Stix in 'Hot Chocolit' is a shimmering rich brown gloss stick with buildable & shimmering lip color packed with lip loving ingredients to lock in moisture for up to 8 hours

❤️‍🔥 Gloss Bomb Heat in 'Hot Chocolit' is a sheer rich brown hybrid lip gloss and plumper that delivers a hint of tint & fuller-looking lips 

Shop our sweetest shade at fentybeauty.com, @sephora, @sephoracanada, @kohls #sephoraxkohls, @ultabeauty and globally!

The combo is combo-ing 💋 

Gloss Bomb is the ultimate gotta-have-it lip gloss with explosive shine that feels as good as it looks & comes in a variety of formulas that you can mix & match 💅🏾💅🏻💅🏿 

@meliszamcfierce's new fave Fenty Lip Combo ⤵️
🤎 Trace'd Out Pencil Lip Liner in 'Brown'd Out'
🍩 Gloss Bomb Stix in 'Blaz'd Donut' 
🎀 Gloss Bomb Universal Lip Luminizer in 'Fu$$y'

Shop Gloss Bomb at @sephora, @sephoracanada, @kohls #sephoraxkohls, @ultabeauty and fentybeauty.com!
